vocab.meaning: trở nên cực kỳ phổ biến/thu hút sự chú ý lớn
vocab.example: Short-video sharing platforms have gained immense traction among teenagers in my country over the last few years.

vocab.meaning: nội dung phong phú về đa phương tiện (hình ảnh, video, âm thanh)
vocab.example: Websites that offer multimedia-rich content tend to be more popular as they provide a more engaging user experience.

vocab.meaning: hợp lý hóa/tối ưu hóa trải nghiệm lướt web
vocab.example: Top-tier e-commerce sites use sophisticated algorithms to streamline the browsing experience for their customers.

vocab.meaning: một trung tâm/nơi tập trung cho cái gì
vocab.example: Social networking sites have become a primary hub for both entertainment and real-time news updates in Vietnam.

vocab.meaning: xóa bỏ khoảng cách về địa lý
vocab.example: Video conferencing websites are popular because they effectively bridge the geographical gap for remote workers and students.

vocab.meaning: sự phổ biến thông tin tức thời
vocab.example: Micro-blogging sites are favored for their ability to facilitate instantaneous information dissemination during global events.

vocab.meaning: biên chỉnh nội dung cho phù hợp với...
vocab.example: Many local websites now use AI to tailor content to the specific cultural nuances of the Vietnamese audience.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng lựa chọn đầu tiên/ưu tiên cho...
vocab.example: For young entrepreneurs, LinkedIn has become the go-to platform for professional networking and B2B marketing.

vocab.meaning: bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân
vocab.example: As people become more tech-savvy, they prefer popular websites that demonstrate a strong commitment to safeguard personal data.

vocab.meaning: thu hút hàng triệu lượt truy cập
vocab.example: Online streaming portals often garner millions of hits daily, reflecting the huge demand for digital entertainment.
